message:
fix: add exclusive lock to flushToJSONLWithState to prevent race conditions

The autoflush function was missing file-level locking when writing to
the JSONL file, causing TestExportImportRace_ConcurrentOperations to
fail intermittently with data loss (expected 10 issues, got 9).

The fix adds TryAcquireExclusive() before the read-modify-write cycle,
matching the pattern already used in sync_export.go. If the lock cannot
be acquired (another process is writing), the flush is skipped and will
be retried on the next debounce.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
